brief_for_next_session: You are a senior web designer/developer continuing an in-progress build. Read this profile fully before acting. The project is a high-craft marketing website for a Belgrade underground techno club. It is already ~90% built, verified working via screenshots. Match the established design language and code patterns exactly; do not restart or redesign unprompted.

user.language: Serbian (latinica). Respond in Serbian. Code/comments may be Serbian.
user.role: Client/founder acting as product owner; hands-on, iterates feature-by-feature, has design taste.
user.communication: Direct, short asks. Wants you proactive but not destructive. Confirms big/irreversible actions.

project.what: Official website (homepage first) for 20/44 — a cult underground electronic-music club in Belgrade.
project.framework_context: Lives inside the WAT framework (Workflows-Agents-Tools). Skills/workflows are markdown SOPs in skills/ and workflows/. .tmp/ is disposable scratch.
project.status: Homepage built and verified. Iterating on polish/assets.

brand.identity: Underground electronic-music institution. Savamala, Belgrade. Relocated to Karadjordjeva 44 (late 2024).
brand.philosophy: Muzika je uvek ispred svega. Music/atmosphere/community over commercial nightlife.
brand.tone: Short sentences, no marketing cliches, focus on music/artists/experience. NEVER use: VIP, najluza zurka, ekskluzivan provod, najjaci klub, luksuz, influencer slang.
brand.brand_profile_file: CONTEXT/context profile (full JSON brand bible — read it).

design_system.direction: thewarehouseproject.com (dark industrial, grainy, technical annotations, torn edges). Adapted, NOT copied — accent swapped to brand yellow.

colors.ink_base: #0a0b0b (near-black, nudged off pure black for depth)
colors.accent: #FED11C (yellow — client decision; deliberately OVERRIDES the red #B5121B from brand profile). Warehouse uses lime #D8FF00; we use yellow.

design_system.fonts: Archivo (bold grotesque, display+body via weights, UPPERCASE headings) + Geist Mono (technical labels/annotations). Loaded via next/font in app/layout.tsx.
design_system.style_rules: SHARP (no rounded corners; global border-radius:0). Grainy. Diagonal hatch dividers. Torn/ragged section edges. Monochrome->color-on-hover gallery. Circular rotating badge/stamp. Full-screen yellow menu overlay.
design_system.global_overlays: Fixed, pointer-events:none, applied site-wide in layout.tsx: .fx-grid (white line grid, cells 3:5 portrait rectangles 90x150px), .fx-dust (sparse white specks via feTurbulence thresholded), .fx-stain (large soft grungy clouds via low-freq feTurbulence), .grain (fine film grain). All procedural SVG/CSS (no image assets). Multi-speed parallax via animation-timeline:scroll(root). All respect prefers-reduced-motion.
design_system.motion: 150-300ms micro-interactions. Signature easing cubic-bezier(0.72,0,0.19,1). Scroll-reveal via [data-reveal]/[data-reveal-group] + IntersectionObserver adding .is-in. Badge intro on load. parallax-y on philosophy bg via animation-timeline:view().
design_system.textured_titles: .text-tex utility = background-clip:text + feTurbulence texture (subtle eroded look). Applied ONLY to single-color display headings (NOT two-tone ones like About/Footer which have accent spans).

tech_stack.styling: Tailwind v4 (theme in app/globals.css @theme; NOT tailwind.config). @tailwindcss/postcss.
tech_stack.images: next/image; sharp available for processing source assets.
tech_stack.no_gsap: Deliberately NO GSAP/jQuery. Use IntersectionObserver + CSS scroll-driven animations instead.
tech_stack.build_check: npm run build (must pass; use it after changes)
tech_stack.screenshot_tool: node tools/screenshot.mjs <url> <label> <width> -> saves to .tmp/screenshots/. Finds cached Chrome win64-149 in ~/.cache/puppeteer. For element/section shots write a quick inline puppeteer script in .tmp/.

architecture.app: app/layout.tsx (fonts, metadata, ScrollReveal, global fx overlays, grain), app/page.tsx (assembles sections), app/globals.css (theme + all utilities), app/icon.png (favicon = logo).

components.Nav: fixed bar + off-top scrolled state (bg/blur when scrollY>30) + full-screen yellow menu overlay (Esc/scroll-lock).
components.Badge: circular stamp: official 20/44 logo (public/images/logo.png) in center + rotating mono text ring.
components.Hero: full-screen hero.jpg + dark gradient, centered Badge (badge-intro), tagline, yellow CTA, Scramble coordinates, corner crop marks. NO giant wordmark (logo carries it).
components.Scramble: client; text resolves from random chars (WHP .scrambled equivalent).
components.InteractiveHouse: SVG hotspots over public/images/house.png facade; hover->yellow tint, click->scrollIntoView(#lokal-<slug>). Accessible venue list beside it. Hotspot polygons in viewBox 1000x667 (data/lokali.ts).
components.About: Filozofija; red bg image (philosophy.jpg) as torn strip (TornDivider top+bottom), scrim, parallax, principles list. Two-tone heading (skip text-tex).
components.TornDivider: deterministic ragged SVG edge (fixed seed 4423, no hydration mismatch) that blends into --color-ink neighbor section.
components.Lokali: 7 alternating venue sections, each id=lokal-<slug>, data-reveal, ImgReveal image (monochrome->color hover), text-tex venue name.
components.Footer: giant 20/44 (accent slash), coordinates, hatch band, legal.
components.ImgReveal: client wrapper for next/image; opacity+scale settle on load (.img-load/.img-in).
components.icons: inline SVG icons (Instagram, Facebook, ArrowUpRight, ArrowDown). NO emoji as icons.

data.data/site.ts: nav, socials, coordinates, address, radnoVreme, genres (marquee), tagline.
data.data/lokali.ts: 7 venues: broj, slug, naziv, sprat, pozicija, opis (original brand-tone copy), slika, hotspot.points.

assets.source_dir: brand assets/ (originals). brand assets/inspo/ = ~80MB Warehouse Project screenshots (reference only; git-ignored, NOT pushed).
assets.logo: public/images/logo.png (official 20/44 circular yellow/black split mark) + app/icon.png favicon.
assets.house: public/images/house.png (B&W architectural facade drawing for interactive hotspots).
assets.philosophy: public/images/philosophy.jpg (red disco-ball club, cropped to remove GEOMETRIA/ANUTA_PIX watermarks).
assets.processing: Use sharp to resize/crop new source images (~1200-1600px wide, mozjpeg q82) into public/images/, then wire in data/lokali.ts.
assets.still_needed: Real photos for Pizzeria (03) and Gore Lounge (07). Optional: hero loop VIDEO.

key_decisions: Yellow #FED11C accent overrides the brand profile's red — final, client decision.

Design direction = Warehouse Project, ADAPTED not copied. NEVER copy their code/assets/logo/text even 'with minor changes'. Reimplement techniques originally. Functional elements (grid, grain) can match visually via original CSS/SVG.
Stack = Next.js + Tailwind v4, no GSAP/jQuery.
Base color nudged from pure #000 to #0a0b0b for depth (so overlays read).
Grid cells = 3:5 portrait rectangles (90x150px), thin lines only (no intersection dots), matching WHP look.
Interactive house uses the B&W facade DRAWING; swap for a real facade photo later and refine hotspot coords.
7 lokali (Basta and Potpalublje were dropped by client).
Removed giant hero wordmark once official logo went into the badge (avoid double 20/44).
constraints: IP: do not reproduce Warehouse Project's proprietary code/CSS/JS/assets/logo/copy; original reimplementation only. Their screenshots stay out of git.
Windows environment; use POSIX-friendly commands via Bash tool; sharp/puppeteer available.
Always npm run build after changes; verify visually with screenshots (WAT workflow requires 2+ comparison rounds).
Keep brand tone; avoid forbidden words listed in brand.tone.
work_completed: Full homepage: Nav+menu, Hero (logo badge, scramble coords, crop marks), Marquee, InteractiveHouse (7 hotspots), About/Filozofija (red torn-strip bg + parallax), Lokali (7 sections), Gallery, Contact, Footer.
Global fx overlays: 3:5 grid + dust + soft stains + grain (procedural), multi-speed parallax, reduced-motion safe.
Scroll-reveal (IntersectionObserver), nav off-top state, badge intro, textured titles (background-clip:text), lazy scale-settle images (ImgReveal).
Official logo integrated into hero badge + favicon.
Dedicated images wired for: Bar 44, Vukosava, Galerija 20/44, Studio Stajga.
Site-teardown skill run on Warehouse Project -> research/2026-07-05-thewarehouseproject-teardown.md (full blueprint: tech stack, design tokens, effects, build plan).
Installed 7 ui/ux skills into 20/44/.claude/skills/ (ui-ux-pro-max is primary).
next_priorities: Real photos for Pizzeria (03) and Gore Lounge (07) -> process with sharp -> wire in data/lokali.ts.
Optional: hero loop video (user has it pending).
Optional: serif display font option (user deferred; currently Archivo grotesque).
Fine-tune overlay intensity / parallax speed if requested.
Future: separate per-lokal pages, event calendar/lineup, ticketing (out of current scope).
important_context: The AICONNECT GitHub repo (github.com/pavlegosicsales-cell/AICONNECT) ALREADY CONTAINS a different project (AIConnect agency site). Do NOT overwrite its main branch. 20/44 was pushed WITHOUT destroying AIConnect (confirm exact location with user — subfolder or branch).
Skills are WAT markdown SOPs (e.g., skills/site-teardown-skill.md.md, workflows/build_frontend_page.md). Read the relevant one before that kind of task.
Verify visually: start dev server, screenshot desktop(1440)+mobile(390), read PNGs, compare, iterate. Next.js dev shows an 'N' indicator bottom-left in screenshots — ignore it (dev only).
When editing text with background-clip:text (text-tex), avoid headings with colored child spans (breaks the two-tone).
There is a persistent memory file for this project at ~/.claude/.../memory/twenty-forty-four-site-project.md.
